summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Ariadne Editorial Studio Batch 4 features (Major UI overhaul). Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 20 test scenarios verified successfully.

issues: Sidebar nav items in dark theme could be slightly brighter for better contrast, but are readable

seed_data_creation: Feed posts and banners seeded via /api/community/feed/seed-samples and /api/community/banners/seed-samples
context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch 4 complete. All major UI overhaul features verified: Studio dark theme (blue/purple), Scuola light theme (green), sidebar menu reorder, Feed renamed to 'Bacheca della Community', Welcome page at /welcome, credential advancement (ACC/PCC/MCC), clickable Studio dashboard stat cards, post image upload, trainer sample posts.
